name: reports
description: Endpoints for creating and managing fire reports, including details such as location, severity, and status.

name: occurrences
description: Endpoints for managing confirmed and validated fire incidents.

name: users
description: Endpoints for managing users and their permissions in the system.

name: media
description: Endpoints for managing multimedia files related to fires, such as photos and videos.

name: status
description: Endpoints for monitoring the status of the system and the health of the API.

name: auth
description: Endpoints related to user authentication and authorization.
